title: Craftable uncraftables
description: I just gave recipes to some random items.
body:
Makes items that cannot be crafted craftable and i likely missed a few so i will fix that in a later patch but here is a list on the items


- Saddles (yes i know they just added a recipie but this is for 1.20)
- Totem of undying
- Dragon egg (duplicating)
- All chain armor
- Bee nests
- Shulker shells (duplicating)
